Rationale: Fig. 1 Nav1.9 co-localize with the presynaptic proteins synaptophysin
Literal

15/5/2017 Pim
- Authors state:
"We also found that the majority of Nav1.8- and Nav1.9-positive boutons were associated with the postsynaptic density protein PSD95 (Fig. 1E, F ..."
"Overall, these data indicate that Nav1.8 and Nav1.9 are presynaptically expressed in a large proportion of DRG neurons. "

- 'Integral ...' term derived from TM domains of Nav1.8.. Experimental description: Experiment of neuronal colture staining are made in rat.
Literal from M&M
"DRG/SC co-cultures were prepared as previously described (Medvedeva et al., 2008). "
